title: Embed Canva + Figma into monday.com [Quicker load times, smoother viewing experience]

posts.author: Fortimus_Team (Fortimus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey monday community!

We’ve created an app that allows you to embed Canva + Figma directly into monday.com.

→ Enjoy lightning-fast design load times and a much smoother viewing experience, all while benefiting from the most affordable solution on the marketplace.

Give it a try and elevate your creative workflow today!

posts.author: sachinkarma (sachin kumar karma)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Fortimus_Team

Embedding Canva and Figma directly into Monday will definitely streamline collaboration, reduce tab switching, and keep everything in one place. Optimizing for fast load times and a smooth viewing experience is a huge plus, especially for teams handling multiple design projects.

posts.author: Fortimus_Team (Fortimus)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks Sachin! We’re happy to help you with a demo of the app. You can schedule a meeting with us here.
